scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:run: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
